logs.notes: Completed premium Settings Page with Focus, Audio, Profile Account details, Aesthetics/Theme selection, and Data privacy tabs, fully integrated with Supabase and localStorage.
Implemented custom color assignment for focus tags with real-time donut chart sync, interactive segments, cloud persistence via Supabase tag_colors, and an elegant Zen Tag Color settings manager.

Fixed root cause of 'focus time today/all time not updating'. Solved RLS block in the Cloudflare Worker's Supabase REST fallback by passing down the user authHeader. This ensures the worker can fetch focus_sessions data successfully, computing totals and avoiding cache resets to 0. Also wired up missing edge-computed fields like 'todayFocusSeconds' inside analyticsCache to optimize frontend computation.
Completed implementation of user-defined tag creation, 6-tag limits, atomic delete/migration, edge sync, and resolved Tag Analytics Widget color consistency and dashboard layout adjustments.
